title: Strategy Analyst
description: Caterpillar is seeking a Strategy Analyst to support strategic planning and business development initiatives across the enterprise.
responsibilities: Conduct market research and competitive analysis
Develop financial models and forecasts for strategic initiatives
Support business case development for new products and markets
Analyze operational performance and identify improvement opportunities
Prepare strategic recommendations for senior leadership
Monitor industry trends and competitive landscape

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
